workflow_name: Customer Escalation Email -> Risk Brief + Manager Loop
user_message: Just came out of consumption trend with Parnell Aerospace. Turn this into my brief and pull out the asks.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Christopher Martinez <christopher.martinez@parnellaeros.com>
To: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-13 08:20 EST
Subject: Follow-up: consumption trend Review

Thank you for the discussion last week. We'd like to move forward with consumption trend. Can we schedule a call this week to finalize the timeline?

---
From: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
To: Christopher Martinez <christopher.martinez@parnellaeros.com>
Date: 2024-02-06 14:27 EST
Subject: URGENT: consumption trend Issue at Parnell Aerospace

There's been a change in our timeline for consumption trend. Can we discuss the implications on the overall project plan?

---
From: Christopher Martinez <christopher.martinez@parnellaeros.com>
To: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-16 10:21 EST
Subject: Quarterly Update: Parnell Aerospace consumption trend

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about consumption trend. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

usability_anchors: Score 5: Complete, well-structured output matching the Customer Escalation Email -> Risk Brief + Manager Loop template with all required artifacts present and actionable
Score 3: Output covers main requirements but missing one or two secondary artifacts or lacking specificity
Score 1: Output is generic, missing key artifacts, or fails to address the specific request
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct consumption trend decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
